  "title": "Vendor and Partnership Manager",
  "description": "Marvellous Performance Marketing Agency&nbsp;is&nbsp;recruiting suitable candidates to fill the position below:

Job Position: Vendor and Partnership Manager
Job Location:&nbsp;Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time (Field-Based)

Description


	We are looking for a proactive and experienced Vendor &amp; Partnership Manager to handle sourcing, assessing, and managing vendors for a startupbusiness.
	This role is field-based, so you must be comfortable working outside the office and navigating markets like Balogun and similar hubs.


Responsibilities


	Source and assess vendors for quality, reliability, and pricing
	Build and maintain strong vendor relationships
	Negotiate terms, prices, and delivery schedules
	Identify partnership opportunities to expand the business
	Conduct market research and monitor competitors
	Ensure timely procurement and delivery of materials
	Provide reports on vendor performance and recommendations


Requirements


	Previous field experience in vendor management or procurement
	Strong knowledge of Lagos markets, especially Balogun and similar
	Excellent negotiation and communication skills
	Self-motivated, proactive, and able to work independently
	Detail-oriented and able to assess product quality quickly.


Salary
N250,000 / Month.

Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should submit their CV to:&nbsp;Kamconsultingserviceslimited@gmail.com&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the email.",

Vendor and Partnership Manager Job at Marvellous Performance Marketing Agency




        
    

        
        Marvellous Performance Marketing Agency is recruiting suitable candidates to fill the position below:

Job Position: Vendor and Partnership Manager
Job Location: Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time (Field-Based)

Description


	We are looking for a proactive and experienced Vendor & Partnership Manager to handle sourcing, assessing, and managing vendors for a startupbusiness.
	This role is field-based, so you must be comfortable working outside the office and navigating markets like Balogun and similar hubs.


Responsibilities
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Source and assess vendors for quality, reliability, and pricing
	Build and maintain strong vendor relationships
	Negotiate terms, prices, and delivery schedules
	Identify partnership opportunities to expand the business
	Conduct market research and monitor competitors
	Ensure timely procurement and delivery of materials
	Provide reports on vendor performance and recommendations


Requirements


	Previous field experience in vendor management or procurement
	Strong knowledge of Lagos markets, especially Balogun and similar
	Excellent negotiation and communication skills
	Self-motivated, proactive, and able to work independently
	Detail-oriented and able to assess product quality quickly.


Salary
N250,000 / Month.

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should submit their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.    

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Website Developer / Platform Manager",
  "description": "Elevare Human Solutions Limited&nbsp;is a leading Human Resource and recruitment solutions company committed to connecting top-tier talent with employers across Nigeria and internationally. We specialize in providing comprehensive HR consulting, talent acquisition, and workforce management services for diverse industries.

Our mission is to deliver tailored recruitment solutions that support organizational growth while fostering career opportunities for skilled professionals. At Elevare, we leverage industry expertise, cutting-edge technology, and a robust network to ensure seamless hiring processes and exceptional candidate experiences.

Join us as we bridge the gap between talent and opportunity, creating impactful partnerships that drive success.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Website Developer / Platform Manager

Job Location:&nbsp;Lekki - Ajah, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time&nbsp;(Hybrid / Remote)

Job Summary


	We are seeking a skilled Website Developer / Platform Manager to design, develop, and manage our corporate website and recruitment platform.
	The role requires strong technical expertise and the ability to integrate AI-driven solutions to enhance automation, user experience, and recruitment efficiency.


Key Responsibilities


	Develop and maintain a responsive, high-performance corporate website.
	Build and manage a job portal with search, filtering, and application functionality.
	Implement secure candidate accounts (profile creation, CV uploads, application tracking).
	Develop an admin dashboard for job posting, candidate review, and shortlisting.
	Create an employer interface for job submissions and recruitment requests.
	Integrate AI tools (CV parsing, job matching, chatbots, automated workflows).
	Implement SEO, analytics, and ensure proper website indexing.


Requirements


	Minimum of 3 years of relevant experience (HR/recruitment platform experience is an advantage).
	Proficiency in HTML, CSS, JavaScript, and modern frameworks (e.g., React or Vue).
	Backend experience (Node.js, PHP, or Python) and database management.
	Experience building secure, scalable web platforms.
	Knowledge of AI/API integration and automation tools.


Salary
N200,000 monthly.

Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV and portfolio highlighting relevant projects, particularly AI-enabled platforms, to:&nbsp;elevarehumansolutions@gmail.com&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the email.",

  "validThrough": "2026-04-21",

    "@type": "Organization",
    "name": "Elevare Human Solutions Limited"
    
  },

    "@type": "Place",

      "@type": "PostalAddress",
       "postalCode": ". ",
       "addressRegion": ". ",

      "addressCountry": "NG"
     
      
    }
  },
  "identifier": {
    "@type": "PropertyValue",
    "name": "",
    "value": "196269"
  },
  "baseSalary": {
    "@type": "MonetaryAmount",
    "currency": "NGN",
    "value": {

Website Developer / Platform Manager Job at Elevare Human Solutions Limited




        
    

        
        Elevare Human Solutions Limited is a leading Human Resource and recruitment solutions company committed to connecting top-tier talent with employers across Nigeria and internationally. We specialize in providing comprehensive HR consulting, talent acquisition, and workforce management services for diverse industries.

Our mission is to deliver tailored recruitment solutions that support organizational growth while fostering career opportunities for skilled professionals. At Elevare, we leverage industry expertise, cutting-edge technology, and a robust network to ensure seamless hiring processes and exceptional candidate experiences.

Join us as we bridge the gap between talent and opportunity, creating impactful partnerships that drive success.
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    



We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Website Developer / Platform Manager

Job Location: Lekki - Ajah, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time (Hybrid / Remote)

Job Summary


	We are seeking a skilled Website Developer / Platform Manager to design, develop, and manage our corporate website and recruitment platform.
	The role requires strong technical expertise and the ability to integrate AI-driven solutions to enhance automation, user experience, and recruitment efficiency.


Key Responsibilities


	Develop and maintain a responsive, high-performance corporate website.
	Build and manage a job portal with search, filtering, and application functionality.
	Implement secure candidate accounts (profile creation, CV uploads, application tracking).
	Develop an admin dashboard for job posting, candidate review, and shortlisting.
	Create an employer interface for job submissions and recruitment requests.
	Integrate AI tools (CV parsing, job matching, chatbots, automated workflows).
	Implement SEO, analytics, and ensure proper website indexing.


Requirements


	Minimum of 3 years of relevant experience (HR/recruitment platform experience is an advantage).
	Proficiency in HTML, CSS, JavaScript, and modern frameworks (e.g., React or Vue).
	Backend experience (Node.js, PHP, or Python) and database management.
	Experience building secure, scalable web platforms.
	Knowledge of AI/API integration and automation tools.


Salary
N200,000 monthly.

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV and portfolio highlighting relevant projects, particularly AI-enabled platforms, to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.    

    

        Click here to Apply

title: Human Resource Lead Job at Future Moves Recruitment Agency Limited
content:
Future Moves Recruitment Agency Limited (FMR Agency) is a licensed full-fledged human resource and management consulting company.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Human Resource Lead

Job Location: Ilupeju, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time
Work Mode: On-site
Industry: Fashion & Retail
Work Schedule: Monday – Friday

Overview
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	We are recruiting an experienced and structured Human Resources Lead to drive workforce performance and strengthen HR operations within a fast-paced fashion and retail organization.
	The ideal candidate will be responsible for managing HR operations, building efficient systems, supporting leadership, and fostering a high-performance work culture.
	This role requires a hands-on HR professional who can balance people management, operational discipline, and business needs while ensuring compliance and employee engagement.
	Ultimately, you will drive organizational effectiveness, improve employee experience, and support business growth through strong HR practices.


Key Responsibilities


	Oversee daily HR operations including recruitment, onboarding, and employee records management
	Develop and implement HR policies, procedures, and frameworks aligned with business objectives
	Ensure compliance with labor laws and workplace regulations
	Lead talent acquisition efforts and improve hiring processes to attract top talent
	Support workforce planning initiatives to align staffing with business growth
	Implement and manage performance management systems
	Drive employee engagement and workplace culture initiatives
	Handle employee relations issues and support conflict resolution
	Maintain accurate HR data, documentation, and reporting systems
	Identify training needs and coordinate staff development programs
	Provide strategic HR support to leadership and department heads


Requirements


	Bachelor’s degree in Human Resources, Business Administration, or a related field
	Minimum of 4 years of HR experience, preferably in retail, fashion, or similar industries
	Professional HR certification (e.g., CIPM) is an added advantage
	Proven experience managing HR operations, recruitment, and employee relations
	Experience working in fast-paced or growing organizations


Salary
400,000 – ?500,000 Monthly Gross + Benefits.

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV and cover letters to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.    

    

        Click here to Apply

Social Media Manager Job at AHM Resource Hub




        
    

        
        AHM Resource Hub - Our client is recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Social Media Manager

Job Location: Karsana, Abuja (FCT) 
Employment Type/Work Setting: Full-time/Onsitee

Job Description
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	We are looking for a talented Social Media Manager to help our client expand their digital footprint, oversee their social media communications efforts and increase brand awareness and affinity.
	The ideal candidate will manage thecompany's image in a cohesive way to achieve theirmarketing and branding goals.
	The candidate should be well-versed in the latest digital technologies and social media trends. The candidate should also have in-depth knowledge of SEO, analytics, and content management tools.
	Ultimately, you should be able to handle our social media presence ensuring high levels of web traffic, engagement and delivering both useful and appealing online information about our company and products.


Responsibilities


	Design and implement social media strategy to align with business goals.
	Generate, edit, publish and share engaging creative content daily (e.g. original text, photos, videos and news) for Instagram, Facebook, LinkedIn, and X.
	Monitor SEO and web traffic metrics.
	Collaborate with other teams, like marketing, sales and customer service to ensure brand consistency.
	Communicate with followers, respond to queries in a timely manner and monitor customer reviews.
	Oversee social media accounts’ design.
	Suggest and implement new features to develop brand awareness.
	Stay up-to-date with current technologies and trends in social media, design tools and applications.
	Update content across various social media channels.
	Utilize social media marketing.
	Design and implement social media strategy that aligns with our business goals.
	Set targets to increase brand awareness and increase customer engagement and loyalty.
	Manage and track budgets for social media activities.
	Research on industry-related topics.
	Become an extension of the company’s brand to connect with existing customers, and acquire new ones.
	Coordinate with marketing and design teams to illustrate articles.


Qualifications


	Bachelor’s Degree in English, Communication, Marketing or relevant field.
	At least 3 years of proven work experience as a Social Media Manager.
	Excellent copywriting and editing skills.
	Ability to deliver creative content (text, image and video).
	Solid knowledge of SEO, keyword research, Meta and Google Analytics.
	Knowledge of online marketing channels.
	Experience with paid social media advertising.


Other Requirements:


	Clear, confident communication abilities.
	Effective time-management skills.
	Significant experience leading a brand’s social media initiatives.
	Keen understanding of how to craft effective social media strategies
	Large social media following
	Analytical and multitasking skills
	Understanding of target audience & brand voice
	Ability to collaborate with cross-functional teams.


Salary
N200,000 / month.

title: Quality Control Manager Job at Future Moves Recruitment Agency Limited
content:
Future Moves Recruitment Agency Limited (FMR Agency) is a licensed full-fledged human resource and management consulting company.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Quality Control Manager

Job Location: Surulere, Lagos
Work Mode: Onsite
Job Type: Full Time
Industry: Male Fashion / Bespoke Tailoring – Luxury Menswear

Overview
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	FMR Agency is recruiting an experienced Quality Control Manager to oversee production and enforce premium quality standards within a luxury menswear tailoring environment.
	The ideal candidate must be a skilled male fashion designer or possess extensive hands-on experience in men’s garment production, particularly suits and traditional wear.
	This role requires strong technical expertise, attention to detail, and the ability to supervise tailors while ensuring all finished pieces meet high-end craftsmanship standards.
	You will play a critical role in maintaining brand quality, improving production processes, and ensuring timely delivery of perfectly finished garments.


Key Responsibilities


	Oversee daily production activities while enforcing high-quality standards across all tailoring processes.
	Conduct quality inspections at all stages (pre-production, mid-production, fittings, and final output).
	Verify measurements, supervise fittings, and ensure accurate implementation of alterations.
	Monitor fabric usage, confirm material quality, and minimize waste during production.
	Supervise and manage tailors and production staff, ensuring discipline and high performance.
	Train team members on luxury finishing standards and improved craftsmanship techniques.
	Implement and maintain SOPs, track defects/rework, and drive continuous process improvement.
	Prepare weekly production and quality reports while monitoring KPIs (delivery timelines, quality rates, efficiency).
	Carry out any other tasks assigned by management.


Requirements


	Minimum of OND / HND / BSc in any discipline.
	Must be a male candidate with strong technical knowledge of men’s fashion tailoring.
	Proven experience as a fashion designer or in supervising production of men’s wear (suits & traditional attire).
	Strong understanding of garment construction, measurements, fittings, and finishing.
	Ability to identify defects and enforce high-quality standards.
	Leadership and team management skills.
	High attention to detail and strong organizational ability.
	Must reside in Surulere or nearby environs.


Work Schedule:


	Monday – Friday: 9:00 AM – 7:00 PM
	Saturday: 10:00 AM – 5:00 PM.


Salary
N200,000 - N250,000 monthly (slightly negotiable).

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.

Note: Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted.    

    

        Click here to Apply
